name: Outrun Depression
short_description: Platform your way through 50 levels and cure yourself from the depression within, buy therapy and acquire upgrades to help you progress even faster. Not hard enough? Try hard mode, your depression will thank you for it. Enjoy.
detailed_description:
A game that is all about parkour.

The purpose of the game is to let the light in, even if it's just one level at a time. Reach the light at the end of each level, challenge yourself, and do so as fast as possible. Play as you like with multiple abilities to acquire, develop your own way of playing, and figure out the mechanics of the game. There are even secrets to be found in order to beat the final level.

Need more challenge?

Check out our hard mode in the settings menu... enjoy the suffering!

We made this game to outrun our depression. Creativity sharpens the mind and calms the soul. If you find yourself in a spot like that, start creating whatever project you want to make. Start working on it. Being able to do something like this is kind of a dream come true. Try and find out for yourself.
